BusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: BLACK RIVER OUTDOOR EDUCATION PROGRAM I

SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description1Txt: OPERATED AN ENVIRONMENTAL EDUCATION CAMPUS AND FACILITIES AND PROVIDED EDUCATIONAL AND AEROBIC PROGRAMS FOR PRIMARY AND PUBLIC MIDDLE SCHOOLS AND THEIR STUDENTS IN THE ADIRONDACK REGION. PROVIDED VISITING STUDENTS OPPORTUNITIES TO MOUNTAIN BIKE, CROSS COUNTRY SKI, AND SNOWSHOE, AS WELL AS LEARN ABOUT THE ENVIRONMENT WITH OPPORTUNITIES TO LEARN ABOUT DIFFERENT PLANTS, ANIMALS, AND SIGHTS OF OUR FARM. DURING THE CURRENT REPORTING PERIOD 8,045 STUDENTS AND 1,253 TEACHERS/CHAPERONES PARTICIPATED IN THE PROGRAM.

GrantOrContributionPdDurYrGrp.GrantOrContributionPurposeTxt: TO SUPPORT THE OUTDOOR EDUCATION PROGRAM OF A RELATED ORGANIZATION

RlnOfActyToAccomOfExmptPrpsGrp.RelationshipStatementTxt: REVENUE DERIVED FROM SALE OF FARM ANIMALS THAT ARE PART OF FARM
EDUCATION AND PROGRAM SERVICES ARE INCLUDED AS A PART OF THE TOTAL.

DepreciationPropertyGrp.PropertyDesc: BUS PARKING LOT-BRC BLACK RIVER CAMPUS
LAND & TRAIL IMPR-BRC BLACK RIVER CAMPUS
BUILDING IMPR-OPER CTR OFFICE FLOOR SUPPORT
PORTA JOHN BLG-BRC BLACK RIVER CAMPUS
EAST GABLE ENCL BLDG OPER CTR

ExpenditureResponsibilityGrp.PurposeOfGrantTxt: TO SUPPORT THE OUTDOOR EDUCATION PROGRAM OF A RELATED ORGANIZATION.
ExpenditureResponsibilityGrp.AnyDiversionByGranteeTxt: TO THE FOUNDATION'S KNOWLEDGE, THE GRANTEE HAS NOT DIVERTED ANY PORTION.
ExpenditureResponsibilityGrp.ResultsOfVerificationTxt: ON DECEMBER 31, 2018 THE GRANTEE PROVIDED THE FOUNDATION WITH A FINAL REPORT WITH RESPECT TO ALL EXPENDITURES MADE FROM THE GRANTS FUNDS AND INDICATING THE PROGRESS MADE TOWARD THE GOALS OF THE GRANT.

OtherIncreasesDetail.Desc: NET PARTNERSHIP DISTRIBUTIONS, BASIS ADJUSTMENTS AND PASSTHROUGH ITEMS
